instruction: Write a FreeMarker macro `truncateText` that outputs at most `maxLength` characters of `text`, appending an ellipsis when truncated. Default maxLength to 80. Escape the result.
code:
<#-- Macro: truncateText(text, maxLength=80) -->
<#macro truncateText text maxLength=80>
  <#assign value = text!"">
  <#if value?length <= maxLength>
    ${value?html}
  <#else>
    ${value?substring(0, maxLength)?html}…
  </#if>
</#macro>
